audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via two-layer enforcement: (1) Header validation rejects any ommers_hash != EMPTY_OMMER_ROOT_HASH for post-merge blocks (lib.rs:107-109), (2) Body validation ensures body.calculate_ommers_root() matches header (validation.rs:191-201). Both checks are consistently applied on all external block paths (Engine API via validate_block_inner:709, P2P via validate_block:1873).
